query: SELECT id, projectId, fileUrl, opacity, isActive, label, version_number, CAST(coordinates AS CHAR) as coordinates FROM project_overlays ORDER BY createdAt DESC LIMIT 5;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user zhFTwZdMBa685Cr.4d37142b48ab --database FiS5WF2NaftJTm6fu3BYQb --execute SELECT id, projectId, fileUrl, opacity, isActive, label, version_number, CAST(coordinates AS CHAR) as coordinates FROM project_overlays ORDER BY createdAt DESC LIMIT 5;
